name: slides-generator
description: Source-grounded agent workflow for building accurate, presentation-ready slide decks.

scripts.test: node scripts/sync-skills.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-project.mjs && node scripts/validate-templates.mjs && node scripts/validate-claim-ledger.mjs tests/fixtures/valid-project && node scripts/lint-claim-refs.mjs tests/fixtures/valid-project && node scripts/validate-arch-map.mjs tests/fixtures/valid-project && node scripts/validate-audience-model.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-story-spine.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-review-log.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-slide-specs.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-design-contract.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-quality-rubric.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/deck-workflow-status.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project --render-ready && node scripts/render-marp.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project --html && node scripts/inspect-rendered-marp.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/browser-qa-marp.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-slide-scorecard.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/validate-repair-plan.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project && node scripts/score-deck.mjs tests/fixtures/render-project --threshold 82 && node scripts/render-marp.mjs evals/source-backed/hackathon-rubric-eval --html && node scripts/inspect-rendered-marp.mjs evals/source-backed/hackathon-rubric-eval && node scripts/browser-qa-marp.mjs evals/source-backed/hackathon-rubric-eval && node scripts/validate-quality-rubric.mjs evals/source-backed/hackathon-rubric-eval && node scripts/deck-workflow-status.mjs evals/source-backed/hackathon-rubric-eval --agentic && node tests/validator-negative.mjs
